stations.name: South Brisbane railway station
stations.walk_minutes_note: Closest station for parts of Highgate Hill.

stations.name: Dutton Park railway station
stations.walk_minutes_note: Closer for southern Highgate Hill streets.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Highgate Hill via Annerley Road, Vulture Street, and Boundary Street. The South-East Busway is on the doorstep.

driving.motorway_access: M3 corridor and CBD access via Captain Cook Bridge.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 5 to 8 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

secondary_state.name: Brisbane State High catchment may apply for parts

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: West End's Boundary Street precinct is within walking distance for cafes, dining, and the West End cultural feel. South Bank cultural precinct sits close.

pockets.name: Hilltop / Dornoch Terrace
pockets.character: Elevated streets with character queenslanders and city outlooks.

pockets.name: West End-adjacent
pockets.character: Streets bordering West End. Walk-to-Boundary-Street lifestyle.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers wanting walk-to-CBD or CityCat-to-CBD lifestyle with character home stock.
Parts of the suburb may fall within the Brisbane State High catchment.
Buyers attracted to the cultural precinct without the West End density.

verify_flags: West End catchment for HH addresses
